tions FAQ Download Home Ptolemy II 0.3 Ptolemy II 0.3 Download Skip to sidebar Ptolemy II 0.3 Download This release consists of infrastructure for software developers who want to use Ptolemy to develop models of their own. Note : This is not the mos

op models of their own. Note : This is not the most recent version of Ptolemy II. The most recent version can be found at http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/ptolemyII/ptIIlatest/ . There are a number of caveats with that go along with this snapshot. S

f caveats with that go along with this snapshot. Some of the files in this release have not been design reviewed, code reviewed, or thorough tested. Classes that have undergone design review are marked "yellow" in the source file. Classes that have

d "yellow" in the source file. Classes that have undergone both design and code review are marked "green" in the source file. The code in release is changing in our own development copy, and some of the changes are not backward compatible. You shou

the changes are not backward compatible. You should not rely on the interface of any class that is rated at less than "green." In rare circumstances we may also modify the interface of green classes before the 1.0 release. The primary difference be

before the 1.0 release. The primary difference between this release and the Ptolemy II 0.2 release is that this release includes domains, actors and documentation including a tutorial on writing applets. Ptolemy II 0.3 requires JDK1.2. Download Gzip

ets. Ptolemy II 0.3 requires JDK1.2. Download Gzipped Tar file: ptII0.3.src.tar.gz (11.6 Mb). Note that this tar file requires GNU tar or WinZip. Solaris 2.5.1 tar will fail to untar this file with a checksum error because the pathnames are longer t

checksum error because the pathnames are longer than 100 characters. If you do not have GNU tar, you can obtain source and selected binaries from ftp://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/pub/gnu . You can also try the zip version below Zip file: ptII0.3.sr

lso try the zip version below Zip file: ptII0.3.src.zip (13.9 Mb) J. Davis, R. Galicia, M. Goel, C. Hylands, E.A. Lee, J. Liu, X. Liu, L. Muliadi, S. Neuendorffer, J. Reekie, N. Smyth, J. Tsay and Y. Xiong, " Heterogeneous Concurrent Modeling and Des

Xiong, " Heterogeneous Concurrent Modeling and Design in Java, " Technical Report UCB/ERL No. M99/40, University of California, Berkeley, CA 94720, July 19, 1999. This paper is included in the zip and tar files above. The tar files include all the .c

tar files above. The tar files include all the .class , .jar and javadoc html documentation, so you need not recompile to use Ptolemy II. This release was compiled with JDK1.2.1. For further information about rebuilding Ptolemy II, see ptII0.3/doc/
tion about rebuilding Ptolemy II, see ptII0.3/doc/install.htm Feedback Please send any feedback to ptII at eecs berkeley edu. Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all rights reserved.
